scripts.verify:hf: npm run build && npm run check:json-parse-guard && npm run test:hf:dist && npm run replay:hf:fixture:dist
scripts.replay:hf:fixture:dist: node dist/src/replay-hf-judgement.js --preview testdata/replay/preview.fixture.json --stage6 testdata/replay/stage6.fixture.json --baseline testdata/replay/baseline.summary.json --out state/replay_fixture_summary.json --strict --expect-no-diff
scripts.replay:hf:fixture: npm run build && node dist/src/replay-hf-judgement.js --preview testdata/replay/preview.fixture.json --stage6 testdata/replay/stage6.fixture.json --baseline testdata/replay/baseline.summary.json --out state/replay_fixture_summary.json --strict --expect-no-diff
